page-index-meta-title: Ethereum - The complete guide from Ethereum.org
page-index-meta-description: Ethereum is a global, decentralized platform for money and new kinds of applications. On Ethereum, you control your own money, data, and identity. No bank, no middleman, no permission needed.
page-index-description: The leading platform for innovative apps and blockchain networks
page-index-hero-image-alt: An illustration of a futuristic city, representing the Ethereum ecosystem.
page-index-hero-title: The internet that belongs to you
page-index-hero-subtitle: Ethereum is the global network where you control your assets, your data, and your identity.
page-index-modal-description: Choose your path: resources for beginners, developers, or enterprise.
page-index-kpi-title: Ethereum gives back control of your assets
page-index-kpi-description: Your bank account is an entry in someone else's database. Your application is a file in someone else's server. Ethereum is an alternative network where you hold your assets directly.
page-index-carousel-privacy-title: Use the internet without being watched
page-index-carousel-privacy-subtitle: Most apps track what you do, who you talk to, and what you own. They sell that data or hand it over when asked. On Ethereum, your activity can stay private.
page-index-carousel-privacy-description: No account tied to your name. No company watching your balance.
page-index-carousel-remittances-subtitle: Skip the {wireFee} wire fee and the {days}+ day wait.
page-index-carousel-remittances-descript: Send <stablecoinsLink>stablecoins</stablecoinsLink> to anyone, anywhere in the world, for just {txFee}. They receive the funds almost instantly.
page-index-carousel-borrowing-subtitle: You don't need a credit score to get started.
page-index-carousel-borrowing-descriptio: Using DeFi apps on Ethereum, you can provide collateral and access credit instantly, no permission required.
page-index-trust-description-1: Ethereum has run continuously since 2015 without a single second of downtime.
page-index-trust-description-2: The code is open for anyone to verify. No company runs it, no one can shut it down, and thousands of independent operators keep it going worldwide.
page-index-simulator-subtitle: Experience how Ethereum works. Just click and explore.
page-index-features-subtitle: Principles that set Ethereum apart from traditional systems
page-index-features-ownership-descriptio: Your Ethereum balance is true ownership.
page-index-features-public-rules-descrip: The code is public, agreements execute exactly as written. Think vending machine versus hoping the cashier gives correct change.
page-index-features-global-description: Anyone, anywhere can use Ethereum. No permission needed.
page-index-features-free-access-descript: No credit check, no minimum balance, no account approval. If you have internet, you're in.
page-index-features-nobody-owns-descript: Changes happen through open proposals that anyone can participate in. Think community garden versus corporate farm.
page-index-get-started-subtitle: Takes {minutes} minutes to get started. No credit check, no paperwork, no minimum balance.
page-index-get-started-learn-description: Start here. Learn what it is, why it matters, and how it works in plain language.
page-index-get-started-build-description: For developers. Access documentation, tools, and tutorials to build on Ethereum.
page-index-get-started-enterprise-descri: Business use cases, institutional resources, and how Ethereum can serve your organization.
